title: Kokkarakko
desc: Marimuthu comes to Chennai and falls for Devi, who behaves like a six-year-old. But Marimuthu is left aghast when Devi recovers from her mental condition and has no memory of him.

title: Kallan Kappalil Thanne
desc: Appukuttan impersonates his twin brother and takes up the job of beating up some men for a lodge owner. However, problems arise when he falls in love with his boss's daughter.

title: Thoovalsparsham
desc: Two sisters are separated during their childhood due to a murder in the family. While one becomes a police officer, the other turns to petty crime for a living.

title: Malikappuram
desc: Devika insults Anusuya for trapping Tara. Later, trouble arises when Anusuya suddenly falls unconscious.

title: Eatho Janma Kalpanayil
desc: Love blooms between Sruthy, a cheerful girl from a humble background and Ashwin, an arrogant wealthy businessman when they accidentally come across each other.

title: Chandrikayil Aliyunnu Chandrakantham
desc: Gautham, an IPS officer, is forced to marry Alakananda, an aspiring doctor. However, when his first love reenters his life, he is forced to choose between his past and his future.

title: Avicharitham
desc: Arvind, a journalist, appears to enjoy a peaceful existence with his wife and daughter. However, his life is thrown into turmoil by his obsession with Devika.

title: Paadatha Painkili
desc: A young woman faces constant torment and oppression from her family, but remains resilient in her search for love and happiness.

title: Devi Mahathmyam
desc: An anthology of stories which deal with the legends and myths related to Goddess Durga, along with the tales of her various forms and manifestations.

title: Santhwanam
desc: Sridevi leads a peaceful and happy life with her husband, Balakrishnan, and his siblings. However, the family faces various adversities that challenge their bonding.

title: Mounaragam
desc: Kalyani, who is speech impaired, is disliked by everyone in her family, except her mother. As she longs for her father's affection, Kiran enters her life.

title: Geetha Govindam
desc: When the past of a middle-aged unmarried businessman confronts him, it affects his unusual romantic relationship with a younger girl.

title: Nammal
desc: NK crafts a devious scheme to turn Shivatha against Jeevan. Later, he becomes embroiled in a fierce confrontation with Mahi over their respective duties within the firm.

title: Five Star Hospital
desc: Rafael, a singer, discovers that he is adopted and goes on a quest to find his birth parents. However, things take a turn when he comes across a vengeful Varma.

title: Sruthi
desc: Subhadra and Ramavarma lead a happy married life. However, things take a turn when Subhadra's music teacher tries to take advantage of her.

title: Father's Day
desc: Seetha, a tutor in a government college, is unmarried and lives with her brother. However, when a criminology student spies on her, he uncovers the dark, hidden secrets of her past.

title: Ottayal Pattalam
desc: Trouble ensues after Venu, a taxi driver, gets suspected of abducting Gopika Varma, an NRI. While he tries to clear off his name, Venu and Gopika fall for each other.

title: Devi Mahathmyam
desc: An anthology of stories which deal with the legends and myths related to Goddess Durga, along with the tales of her various forms and manifestations.

title: Malikappuram
desc: Devika insults Anusuya for trapping Tara. Later, trouble arises when Anusuya suddenly falls unconscious.

title: Aayushkalam
desc: Balakrishnan, who is in a desperate need of a heart transplant, receives the heart of Aby. However, things take an unexpected turn when he starts seeing Aby's ghost.

title: Nayam Vyakthamakkunnu
desc: Sukumaran, a budding politician, neglects his wife as he focuses on his career. As a result, their relationship weakens leading to a separation.

title: I.G.
desc: Inspector General Durga Prasad gets appointed as the head of an an anti-terrorism squad. However, a revelation soon forces him to choose between his family and his duty.

title: Thoovalsparsham
desc: Two sisters are separated during their childhood due to a murder in the family. While one becomes a police officer, the other turns to petty crime for a living.

title: Malikappuram
desc: Girideva recollects past memories about Anusuya, Tara and Anand. Soon, Anusuya becomes emotional when she thinks about Tara.

title: Eatho Janma Kalpanayil
desc: Love blooms between Sruthy, a cheerful girl from a humble background and Ashwin, an arrogant wealthy businessman when they accidentally come across each other.

desc: Kalyani, who is speech impaired, is disliked by everyone in her family, except her mother. As she longs for her father's affection, Kiran enters her life.

title: Geetha Govindam
desc: When the past of a middle-aged unmarried businessman confronts him, it affects his unusual romantic relationship with a younger girl.

title: Nammal
desc: Follow the story of six youngsters as they navigate through happiness, heartbreaks and all the challenges that life throws at them.

title: Chanchattam
desc: Mohan and Yamuna fall in love with each other and get married. However, their marriage hits troubled waters after Mohan confesses that he unexpectedly cheated on her with one of her friends.
